### Props

| Name          | Type          | Required                       | Default                                                     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------- | ------------- | ------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `title`       | `string`      |                                | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Activity log')`               | Page title. Defaults to "Activity log" so a bare manifest entry still renders meaningfully.                                                                                                                              |
| `description` | `string`      |                                | `''`                                                        | Description shown under the title when `showTitle` is set.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `showTitle`   | `boolean`     |                                | `false`                                                     | Whether to render the inline page header. Default false to mirror CnIndexPage.                                                                                                                                           |
| `icon`        | `string`      |                                | `''`                                                        | MDI icon name for the header.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `register`    | `string`      |                                | `''`                                                        | OpenRegister register slug. Required (with `schema`) for store-backed mode.                                                                                                                                              |
| `schema`      | `string`      |                                | `''`                                                        | OpenRegister schema slug. Required (with `register`) for store-backed mode.                                                                                                                                              |
| `source`      | `string`      |                                | `''`                                                        | Custom log source URL — used when `register`+`schema` is not set.                                                                                                                                                        |
| `columns`     | `Array<string | {key: string, label: string}>` |                                                             | `[]`                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Column definitions for the table. When omitted, the component uses a sensible default of `[timestamp, actor, action, target, details]`. Pass either an array of strings (treated as keys + auto-labels) OR an array of `{ key, label, sortable, width }` objects. |
| `rowKey`      | `string`      |                                | `'id'`                                                      | Row identifier property. Defaults to `id` (matches OR + most custom log shapes).                                                                                                                                         |
| `emptyText`   | `string`      |                                | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No log entries to show')`     | Text shown when there are no log entries.                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `errorText`   | `string`      |                                | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Could not load log entries')` | Text shown when the fetch fails.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `store`       | `union`       |                                | `null`                                                      | Override the object store. Useful when the consuming app calls `createObjectStore` with a custom ID. When null, the default `useObjectStore()` is used. The component skips store wiring entirely when in `source` mode. |
